embeds.title: Don't - Persona 3 Reload: Episode Aigis Original Soundtrack
embeds.description:
This is the original soundtrack from the game Persona 3 Reload.

The full soundtrack can be downloaded via these links:
- MP3: https://bitly.cx/0MCRL
- FLAC: https://bitly.cx/d7Pq

The full soundtrack playlist is available here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLa5LE8jbn8775vaOKqMLGR4VjbkyPMn4
